setupInstructions.fabric:
Before connecting Microsoft Fabric, ensure the following prerequisites are met:

  1. Register a Service Principal — Create an App Registration in Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD). Note the Application (Client) ID and generate a Client Secret.
  2. Enable Service Principal access in Fabric — In the Fabric Admin Portal, under Tenant Settings, ensure "Service principals can use Fabric APIs" is enabled for your security group.
  3. Grant workspace permissions — Add the Service Principal as at least a Contributor on the Fabric workspace containing your Lakehouse or Data Warehouse. Without this, the connection succeeds but no tables are visible.
  4. Verify the SQL analytics endpoint is active — For Lakehouses, open the SQL analytics endpoint in Fabric and confirm tables appear. If the endpoint shows no tables, your Delta tables may not be committed or the endpoint hasn't synced yet.
  5. Confirm tables exist — The Lakehouse must contain committed Delta tables (or the Data Warehouse must have created tables). Empty lakehouses will connect successfully but report zero tables.
